account.title: Account
account.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface

quickSettings.title: Quick Settings
quickSettings.sendByCtrlEnterDescription: When enabled, pressing Ctrl+Enter will send the message instead of just Enter. This is useful for IME users to avoid accidental sends.

dragHandle.toggleAndMove: Click to toggle, drag to move

brandingSettings.ownerOnly: Only the workspace owner can change branding.
brandingSettings.removedLogo: Logo removed. The default logo will be shown.
brandingSettings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
brandingSettings.errorType: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG.

titleSection.label: App title
titleSection.description: Shown in the sidebar header. Leave empty to use the default.

logoSection.label: Logo
logoSection.description: Replace the default logo shown in the sidebar header.
logoSection.hint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG. Max 2MB.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account username, password, and passkeys

avatar.title: Profile picture
avatar.description: Add a photo so teammates can recognise you.
avatar.hint: Square images work best. PNG or JPG.

errors.uploadFailed: Could not upload the picture. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

username.title: Change username
username.description: Update the username you use to sign in.

errors.unchanged: The new username is the same as the current one

password.title: Change password
password.description: Use a strong password you do not use elsewhere.

errors.required: Please fill in all password fields
errors.short: Password must be at least {{min}} characters

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in without a password using your fingerprint, face, device PIN, or a security key.
passkeys.empty: No passkeys yet. Add one to sign in to this workspace quickly and securely — no password needed.
passkeys.notSupported: This browser does not support passkeys, so new ones cannot be added here.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your passkeys. Please try again.
errors.registerFailed: Could not create the passkey. Please try again.
errors.duplicate: This device or security key is already registered as a passkey.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

identity.title: Avatar style
identity.description: Pick a ready-made avatar or a colour instead of uploading a photo.

color.heading: Choose a colour
color.hint: The colour is used behind your initial.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your choice. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

claudeConnection.description: Link your own Claude subscription to use it in your sessions. Each user has their own isolated credential.
claudeConnection.loadError: Could not check subscription status. Please try again.
claudeConnection.banner: Your Claude subscription is not linked yet. You need to link it before using Claude in your sessions.
claudeConnection.bannerHint: Click the button below to open the terminal and run
claudeConnection.ownerNote: Your credential is linked automatically as the owner — no action required.

modal.title: Link Claude account
modal.afterComplete: Complete the OAuth login flow, then close this dialog and click "Re-check" to refresh the status.

agyConnection.description: Link your own Antigravity subscription to use it in your sessions. Each user has their own isolated credential.
agyConnection.loadError: Could not check subscription status. Please try again.
agyConnection.banner: Your Antigravity subscription is not linked yet. You need to link it before using agy in your sessions.
agyConnection.bannerHint: Click the button below to open the terminal and run
agyConnection.ownerNote: Your credential is linked automatically as the owner — no action required.

modal.title: Link Antigravity account
modal.afterComplete: Complete the OAuth login flow, then close this dialog and click "Re-check" to refresh the status.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.warning: A temporary password will be generated and shown once. The user must change it on their next sign-in, and all their existing sessions will be signed out.
reset.successHint: Share this temporary password securely. It is shown only once.

invite.title: Invite a user
invite.roleHint: The invited user will be created with this role.
invite.successHint: Share this single-use link. It is shown only once.

providerSharing.heading: Provider credential sharing
providerSharing.subtitle: Choose, per provider, whether credentials are shared across all users or isolated per user.

modeDescription.isolated: Each user has their own credentials

agyWarning.title: Experimental isolation
agyWarning.description: Isolating Antigravity credentials is experimental and requires restarting active sessions to take effect.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control which notification events you receive.

webPush.title: Web Push Notifications
webPush.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
webPush.denied: Push notifications are blocked. Please allow them in your browser settings.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Play a short tone when a chat run finishes.

darkMode.label: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: Toggle between light and dark themes

rtlLayout.label: RTL Layout
rtlLayout.description: Switch interface direction between RTL and LTR (independent of language)

themePresets.title: Theme
themePresets.description: Brand-tinted color presets applied on top of light and dark mode

projectSorting.label: Project Sorting
projectSorting.description: How projects are ordered in the sidebar

theme.label: Editor Theme
theme.description: Default theme for the code editor

wordWrap.label: Word Wrap
wordWrap.description: Enable word wrapping by default in the editor

showMinimap.label: Show Minimap
showMinimap.description: Display a minimap for easier navigation in diff view

lineNumbers.label: Show Line Numbers
lineNumbers.description: Display line numbers in the editor

scope.label: Scope
scope.userDescription: User scope: Available across all projects on your machine
scope.projectDescription: Local scope: Only available in the selected project
scope.cannotChange: Scope cannot be changed when editing an existing server

validation.stdioRequiresCommand: stdio type requires a command field
validation.jsonHelp: Paste your MCP server configuration in JSON format. Example formats:

git.title: Git Configuration
git.description: Configure your git identity for commits. These settings will be applied globally via git config --global

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Generate API keys to access the external API from other applications.

newKey.alertMessage: This is the only time you'll see this key. Store it securely.

apiKeys.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

github.title: GitHub Tokens
github.description: Add GitHub Personal Access Tokens to clone private repositories via the external API.
github.descriptionAlt: Add GitHub Personal Access Tokens to clone private repositories. You can also pass tokens directly in API requests without storing them.

form.howToCreate: How to create a GitHub Personal Access Token →

github.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this GitHub token?

documentation.title: External API Documentation
documentation.description: Learn how to use the external API to trigger Claude/Cursor sessions from your applications.

notInstalled.title: TaskMaster AI CLI Not Installed
notInstalled.description: TaskMaster CLI is required to use task management features. Install it to get started:

steps.autoAvailable: TaskMaster features will automatically become available
steps.initCommand: Use task-master init in your project directory

settings.enableDescription: Show TaskMaster tasks, banners, and sidebar indicators across the interface

antigravity.description: Google AI Pro via the agy CLI

antigravity.modelNote: Uses Google AI Pro via agy CLI (v1.x). The active model is selected inside agy settings, not from this UI.

login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in to your {{agent}} account to enable AI features
login.reAuthDescription: Sign in with a different account or refresh credentials

skipPermissions.label: Skip permission prompts (use with caution)
skipPermissions.cursorDescription: Equivalent to -f flag in Cursor CLI

allowedTools.title: Allowed Tools
allowedTools.description: Tools that are automatically allowed without prompting for permission

blockedTools.title: Blocked Tools
blockedTools.description: Tools that are automatically blocked without prompting for permission

allowedCommands.title: Allowed Shell Commands
allowedCommands.description: Shell commands that are automatically allowed without prompting

blockedCommands.title: Blocked Shell Commands
blockedCommands.description: Shell commands that are automatically blocked

codex.description: Controls how Codex handles file modifications and command execution

default.title: Default
default.description: Only trusted commands (ls, cat, grep, git status, etc.) run automatically. Other commands are skipped. Can write to workspace.

acceptEdits.title: Accept Edits
acceptEdits.description: All commands run automatically within the workspace. Full auto mode with sandboxed execution.

bypassPermissions.title: Bypass Permissions
bypassPermissions.description: Full system access with no restrictions. All commands run automatically with full disk and network access. Use with caution.

technicalInfo.default: sandboxMode=workspace-write, approvalPolicy=untrusted. Trusted commands: cat, cd, grep, head, ls, pwd, tail, git status/log/diff/show, find (without -exec), etc.
technicalInfo.acceptEdits: sandboxMode=workspace-write, approvalPolicy=never. All commands auto-execute within project directory.
technicalInfo.bypassPermissions: sandboxMode=danger-full-access, approvalPolicy=never. Full system access, use only in trusted environments.
technicalInfo.overrideNote: You can override this per-session using the mode button in the chat interface.

antigravity.title: Permission Settings
antigravity.description: The agy CLI manages its own permission behaviour. There are no allow or block lists to configure from this interface.

skipPermissions.label: Permission prompts are skipped
skipPermissions.description: agy runs with --dangerously-skip-permissions, so tool and command approvals are not requested during a session.

cliNote.title: Configure permissions in agy
cliNote.description: Permission and autonomy options live inside the agy CLI settings, not in this UI.

description.claude: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to Claude
description.cursor: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to Cursor
description.codex: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to Codex
description.opencode: Model Context Protocol servers provide additional tools and data sources to OpenCode

help.title: About Codex MCP
help.description: Codex supports stdio-based MCP servers. You can add servers that extend Codex's capabilities with additional tools and resources.

pluginSettings.title: Plugins
pluginSettings.description: Extend the interface with custom plugins. Install from git or drop a folder in ~/.claude-code-ui/plugins/
pluginSettings.securityWarning: Only install plugins whose source code you have reviewed or from authors you trust.
pluginSettings.noGitRemote: No git remote — update not available

sections.officialDescription: Maintained by the CloudCLI team and ready for direct install.
sections.unofficialDescription: Unofficial plugins and integrations from other users. Review the source before installing.

starterPlugin.name: Project Stats
starterPlugin.description: File counts, lines of code, file-type breakdown, and recent activity for your project.

terminalPlugin.name: Terminal
terminalPlugin.description: Integrated terminal with full shell access directly within the interface.

scheduledPromptPlugin.name: Scheduled Prompts
scheduledPromptPlugin.description: Schedule workspace prompts, review run history, and manage recurring local tasks.

claudeWatchPlugin.name: Claude Watch
claudeWatchPlugin.description: Watch long-running Claude Code sessions for hangs and expose process controls.
